---
title: "Swiss Plateau lakes rplum"
author: "Antonia Klatt"
date: "2026-05-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#Load packages

library(rplum)
library(readr)
Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL", "English")

rm(list=ls())

setwd(here("01_Data","rplum"))
coredir <- "01_Data\\rplum\\Plum_runs"

#Al: did not find minimum error specific for the WELL™ Germanium Well Detector (Mirion Technologies); set default Al instead
#Include radium measurements ra.case=1

#Murtensee


Plum(core="MUR23_D1", otherdates= "MUR23_D1_137Cs.csv",  d.min=0, d.max= 90, 
     BCAD=TRUE, date.sample=2023.3, n.supp=3, remove.tail= FALSE, ra.case=1)


#Zugersee Northern Basin


Plum(core="ZUG24_N2", otherdates= "ZUG24_N_137Cs.csv",  d.max= 50, BCAD=TRUE, date.sample=2024.75, 
     n.supp=3, ra.case=1, remove.tail= FALSE) 


#Zugersee Sourthern Basin

#plum run excluding turbidite layers

Plum(core="ZUG24_S3", otherdates= "ZUG24_S3_137Cs.csv",  d.max= 45, BCAD=TRUE, date.sample=2024.75, n.supp=3, 
     ra.case=1, remove.tail= FALSE)
